sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86958" key="prodiabolh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προδια-βολή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n86958.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">discrediting in advance,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aps.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">pp.242,247</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
